name: El Celler de Can Roca
search_query: El Celler de Can Roca Girona

reviews.author: Carlos S.
reviews.text: If you are a food person, this is the pilgrimage.

reviews.text: Yes, it is excellent. Yes, it is 350 euros. Yes, the olive oil course alone is worth flying to Girona.
